title: Busiest Pickup Zones in a City
notes: Blue warm-up: a clean two-table join. The one discipline is that 'busiest' counts status='completed' rides, not every request row (no_driver and cancelled requests produce no ride). City is a geozones attribute, so the filter rides on the joined dimension. Tie on the count is broken by zone_name so the top-10 cut is deterministic. mssql: replace LIMIT 10 with SELECT TOP 10 (or OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY).
